problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: If Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix is applied to at, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
